_comment: Tests node 1 routing for Village Remedies (Aussie ack tone): booking routes to book_intent, cancellation routes to cancel_intent, info routes silently to info_pivot.

scenarios.name: Booking intent routes to book_intent with Aussie ack

history.content: I want to book an acupuncture appointment

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks one Aussie ack ('No worries!' / 'Sounds good!') then calls universal_router intent='book_intent' with implied_service='acupuncture' (or similar). FAIL if agent asks for more service detail, routes to info_pivot, or omits the tool call.

scenarios.name: Cancellation intent routes to cancel_intent with Aussie ack

history.content: I need to cancel my appointment

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks one Aussie ack then calls universal_router intent='cancel_intent'. FAIL if agent routes to book_intent or info_pivot.

scenarios.name: Info question routes silently to info_pivot

history.content: What does a physiotherapy session involve?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='info_pivot' with zero spoken output and system__message_to_speak empty. FAIL if agent answers the question inline.
